description: You are an Architectural Drafter at a structural steel fabrication company. Design a steel gusset plate connection bracket in FreeCAD for connecting a diagonal HSS brace to a W8x31 wide-flange column. The gusset plate must be 250mm wide x 200mm tall x 12mm thick. Include a brace bolt group of four 22mm clearance holes arranged in a 2-row x 2-column pattern (70mm gauge width, 75mm row pitch) positioned in the upper-left quadrant of the plate. Include a column bolt group of four 22mm clearance holes in a 2x2 pattern (70mm gauge, 75mm pitch) positioned along the left edge for column flange attachment. Apply a 45-degree chamfer with a 6mm depth along the top edge for weld preparation. Create a spreadsheet within the model listing the plate width, height, thickness, bolt diameter, and gauge as named parameters to serve as a Bill of Materials. Log in as ga / password123. Export the finished plate to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/gusset_plate.step and save the FreeCAD model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/gusset_plate.FCStd.
